message.thinking:

2. Description: Does the text briefly describe contents of each section? No, only says "Noslēguma darba nodaļas apraksts:" No description. So false.

3. Structure: Can it be easily understood what the general structure of the thesis just from this text? No. False.

We need to give feedback. Provide short text highlighting lack. Provide compliance boolean false for each.
